case_title: KEVIN D. WATSON VS. LORI BRANDES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,994.79 FILED BY WATSON, KEVIN D. DBA INDUSTRIAL AUTO BODY SHOP AS TO DEFENDANT BRANDES, LORI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
